- Initializing project context.
- 2026-03-11 [Commonwealth Store/Coupons + Accent Cleanup]: Replaced hardcoded coupon configs with a persisted `Coupon` Prisma model plus admin CRUD under `/admin/coupons`, seeded starter coupons, added server-backed coupon validation for checkout, removed coupon suggestion chips so customers must type codes manually, and shifted the store/admin gold accent token path to green-neutral styling in `store/src/app/globals.css`. Prisma client regeneration and a database push are required after pulling the schema changes. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-11 [Commonwealth Store/Admin Product Pricing UX]: Updated `store/src/components/admin/ProductForm.tsx` so the admin product editor now renders explicit price inputs for every active store region, including the default region, instead of only separating base/default pricing from non-default overrides; aligned region guidance copy in `store/src/components/admin/RegionSettingsPanel.tsx` to match the new all-region pricing requirement. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-09 [Commonwealth Store/Force-Dynamic Rendering]: Added `export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'` to all 16 store pages and routes that query Prisma (/, /artists, /products, /products/[slug], /categories/[slug], /artists/[id], /sitemap.xml, /admin, /admin/analytics, /admin/products, /admin/products/new, /admin/products/[id], /admin/categories, /admin/artists, /admin/sales, /admin/sales/new) to prevent static prerendering at build time; pages now render at request time (SSR) so DATABASE_URL only needs to be available at runtime, not during `next build`. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-05 [PSZ Main Web/Phase 1]: Initialized Next.js foundation in `psz_main_web` with Tailwind setup, two-font typography, responsive global Navbar/Footer, and external Commonwealth bridge link wiring via env-configurable URL. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-05 [PSZ Main Web/Footer]: Fixed Next.js server runtime error by removing `onSubmit` event handler from newsletter placeholder in `Footer` and keeping it non-interactive for server component compatibility. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-05 [PSZ Main Web/Phase 2]: Added typed models (`Program`, `Article`, `ImpactStat`), dummy datasets, async services with shared 500ms delay utility, and schema documentation alignment for future Supabase migration. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-05 [PSZ Main Web/Phase 3]: Implemented modular homepage assembly in `src/app/page.tsx` with Hero, mission overview, programs preview, framer-motion impact counters, join CTA, and news preview; wired all data through Phase 2 service layer. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-05 [PSZ Main Web/Phase 4]: Added Programs and News hubs with category filters/search, dynamic `[slug]` detail pages with metadata generation, related content/share affordances, and service-layer slug fetch helpers. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-05 [PSZ Main Web/Phase 5]: Completed SEO and semantic polish with strict metadata for layout/static pages, improved dynamic metadata consistency, semantic heading refinements in hub components, and verified optimized Next `Image` usage with descriptive alt text. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-05 [Handover/Docs]: Added comprehensive developer handover documentation for main web completion and Commonwealth kickoff, and added global footer developer credit text (`Development by 04`). (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-05 [Commonwealth/Planning]: Added detailed phase-by-phase implementation roadmap at `docs/commonwealth/psz_commonwealth_execution_plan.md`, locking cycle scope (mock checkout, guest flow, local cart persistence, EN-first l10n scaffold) and defining architecture, routing, QA, and documentation gates for execution. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-07 [PSZ Main Web/Performance]: Major performance & clean-code pass — (1) Created `LazyVideo` component (`src/components/ui/LazyVideo.tsx`) with IntersectionObserver-based lazy loading and auto-pause for off-screen videos; (2) Replaced all non-hero `<video>` elements with `LazyVideo` to defer ~103 MB of video downloads; (3) Switched all `<img>` tags to `next/image` with AVIF/WebP format support, quality caps, and proper `sizes` hints for approach grid, showcase, impact hero, heart members (~54 MB of PNGs), program placeholders, and testimonial avatars; (4) Removed redundant Google Fonts CSS `@import` (already loaded via `next/font/google`); (5) Removed artificial 500 ms delays from all three service functions (`getArticles`, `getPrograms`, `getImpactStats`); (6) Updated `next.config.ts` with image optimization config (AVIF/WebP, remote patterns for Pexels/Unsplash, 30-day cache TTL), compression, and static asset cache headers; (7) Downscaled external Pexels video URLs from UHD 2560×1440 to 720p; (8) Added CSS `contain: layout style paint` on `[data-scroll-section]` and `content-visibility: auto` on `.dark-bottom` for rendering performance; (9) Extracted inline data arrays (HEART_MEMBERS, SCROLL_TEXT_BLOCKS, PROGRAM_CARDS, TESTIMONIAL_AVATARS) from 1353-line `HomeClient.tsx` into `home.content.ts` reducing component to ~1220 lines; (10) Fixed `info.mp4` → `Info.mp4` filename casing bug that would 404 on Linux/Vercel. Build passes cleanly with zero errors or warnings. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-07 [Commonwealth Lab/Marketplace UI]: Implemented complete Commonwealth Lab Marketplace UI with dummy data for presentation — (1) Created `Product` model (`src/lib/models/Product.ts`) with `Product` interface, `CartItem` interface, `ProductCategory` type, and `PRODUCT_CATEGORIES` array; (2) Added 16 dummy products across 4 categories (Traditional Clothing, Handicrafts, Cultural Goods, PSZ Merchandise) in `src/data/products.ts` with Unsplash placeholder images; (3) Built product service layer (`src/lib/services/getProducts.ts`) with `getProducts`, `getProductBySlug`, `getFeaturedProducts`; (4) Created `CartContext` (`src/features/commonwealth-lab/context/CartContext.tsx`) with React Context API for client-side cart state (add/remove/update/clear, computed totals); (5) Built 9 reusable components: `ProductCard`, `ProductGrid`, `ProductGallery`, `CategoryFilter`, `QuantitySelector`, `CartItem`, `CartSummary`, `MarketplaceHero`, `ProductDetailClient`; (6) Implemented 5 page routes under `/commonwealth-lab/`: landing page (hero, featured products, category grid, CTA), product listing (search, category filter, sort, pagination with Suspense boundary), product detail with `generateStaticParams`/`generateMetadata`, cart page, checkout page with form and payment selector; (7) Integrated "Commonwealth Lab" nav link into `site.ts` and updated `Navbar.tsx` slice range; (8) Luxury/premium design with gold (#C4A265) accents, elegant typography, hover animations, and responsive layouts; (9) All product images use `next/image` with proper sizing; (10) Also resolved merge conflict markers across 9 files from prior rebase (home.content.ts, HomeClient.tsx, getArticles.ts, getPrograms.ts, getImpactStats.ts, next.config.ts, globals.css, context.instructions.md, package-lock.json). Build passes cleanly with 36 static pages generated. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-07 [PSZ Main Web/Media Optimization]: Comprehensive image and video performance optimization — (1) Created `scripts/optimize-images.mjs` using sharp to batch-compress all 23 local PNG/JPEG images to WebP at multiple responsive sizes (sm 480px, md 960px, lg 1440px, xl 1920px, full), achieving 94.3% reduction (82.46 MB → 4.66 MB); output at `public/images/optimized/` with manifest.json containing paths and blur placeholder base64 data URIs; (2) Created `scripts/generate-video-posters.mjs` to generate dark-gradient WebP poster placeholders for all 4 local MP4 videos, output at `public/videos/posters/`; (3) Enhanced `LazyVideo` component with `poster` prop for instant visual before video loads, `webmSrc` prop for dual MP4+WebM source support, and state-based `<source>` element injection so video data is never downloaded until IntersectionObserver triggers; (4) Created `src/lib/utils/media-helpers.ts` with `getBlurDataURL()`, `getOptimizedImagePath()`, `getOptimizedSizes()`, and `VIDEO_POSTERS` exports for centralized media optimization access; (5) Added `placeholder="blur"` + `blurDataURL` to all member images (×8), approach grid images (×7), founder image, and showcase image in HomeClient.tsx — eliminates CLS and shows instant low-quality preview; (6) Added `poster` attribute to hero `<video>` and all 4 `LazyVideo` instances so users see a frame immediately instead of blank space; (7) Switched footer CSS `background-image` from 18.17 MB `footer.png` to 0.14 MB `footer.webp` (99.2% savings); (8) Extended `next.config.ts` headers with security headers (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy), font caching, video poster caching, and Accept-based Vary header for optimized images; (9) Updated `vercel.json` with CDN caching rules for `/images/optimized/`, `/videos/`, `/videos/posters/`, and `/_next/static/`; (10) Added npm scripts: `optimize:images`, `optimize:posters`, `optimize:all`, and wired `prebuild` to auto-run optimization before `next build`. Build passes cleanly — 36 static pages, zero errors/warnings. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-07 [PSZ Main Web/Mobile Responsiveness]: Comprehensive mobile responsiveness fixes across entire site — (1) Fixed horizontal overflow by changing all `100vw` sections to `width: 100%; max-width: 100%` with `overflow-x: hidden` on mobile, expanded covered sections to include split, highlight, overlay-reveal, final-cta, scroll-text-block, impact-text/image; (2) Marketplace 2-column mobile grid: changed `ProductGrid.tsx` from `grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2` to `grid-cols-2` with tighter gap (`gap-x-3 gap-y-6`), updated Commonwealth Lab landing page featured products and category grids to also use `grid-cols-2` at all sizes; (3) Made `ProductCard` compact on mobile with smaller text (`text-xs`), reduced padding (`px-2 pt-3 pb-4`), shorter aspect ratio (`aspect-[3/4]` vs `aspect-[4/5]`), and correct `sizes="50vw"` hint for 2-col layout; (4) Fixed hero text positioning: shifted `.hero-content` up via `top: 45%` at 768px, `top: 42%` at 480px, `top: 40%` at 375px to prevent text appearing too low on mobile; (5) Reduced stack-card (programs section) sizing on mobile: `min-height: 38rem` → `34rem` → `30rem` across 768px/480px/375px breakpoints, illustration panel height `11rem` → `9rem` → `8rem`, content padding tightened, added smaller font sizes for card description/subtitle; (6) Fixed navbar mobile padding from `6rem 5% 3rem` → `2.4rem 5% 1.6rem` to prevent excessive top space; (7) Fixed `MarketplaceHero` from `w-screen` to `w-full` preventing horizontal overflow; (8) Added mobile-appropriate padding to Commonwealth Lab sections (`py-16 sm:py-28`, `px-4 sm:px-6`); (9) Added `padding-inline: 5%` to pinned-video section text on mobile for edge safety. Build passes cleanly — 36 static pages, zero errors. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-07 [PSZ Main Web/Scroll Speed & Chapters]: (1) Sped up all GSAP ScrollTrigger scroll-pinned sections — heart section end `total*100%` → `total*55%` and scrub `0.5` → `0.35`; programs section end `cards.length*130%` → `cards.length*80%` and scrub `0.45` → `0.35`; pinned videos end `"bottom top"` → `"70% top"`; canvas section end `"600% top"` → `"350% top"`; (2) Reduced Lenis smooth scroll duration from `1.2` → `0.85` for snappier page feel; (3) Tightened card animation timings — enter `1.6s` → `1.2s`, dot activation `0.4/0.7` → `0.3/0.5`, hold `1.1s` → `0.6s`, push-back `1.1s` → `0.8s`; (4) Removed "Our Impact" header section and image section, replacing them with new "Our Chapters" section (`chapters-section`) showcasing 5 PSZ city chapters: Islamabad (Faisal Mosque SVG, green accent), Bahawalpur (Noor Mahal SVG, gold accent), Hyderabad (Pakka Qila SVG, blue accent), Lahore (Minar-e-Pakistan SVG, red accent), Multan (Shah Rukn-e-Alam SVG, purple accent); (5) Added `Chapter` type and `PSZ_CHAPTERS` data array to `home.content.ts`; (6) Chapters section features animated globe SVG with pulsing pin dots, glassmorphic city cards with landmark SVG icons, accent colour bars, hover glow effects, and index watermarks; (7) Added ~200 lines of chapters CSS with responsive 5→3→2 column grid, `globe-spin` keyframe animation, card hover transforms, and `[data-theme="light"]` overrides; (8) Cleaned up unused `IMAGES.impactHero` reference; (9) Added `.chapters-section` to theme transition smoothing and mobile overflow prevention lists. Build passes — 36 static pages, zero errors. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-09 [PSZ Main Web/Admin Routing]: Fixed admin access mismatch between main site and separate store app by adding `src/app/admin/[[...slug]]/route.ts` redirect logic to forward `/admin` and nested admin paths to `siteConfig.commonwealthUrl/admin...`; updated `Navbar` Commonwealth button to open the configured external store URL in a new tab (`target="_blank"`, `rel="noopener noreferrer"`) so users land in the correct app instead of a main-site 404. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-09 [PSZ Main Web/Commonwealth URL Defaults]: Updated `src/config/site.ts` to use environment-aware `commonwealthUrl` fallback (`http://localhost:3001` in development, `https://store.paksarzameenwfo.com` in production) so admin redirects and bridge links remain valid even when `NEXT_PUBLIC_COMMONWEALTH_URL` is not set. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-09 [Commonwealth Store/Admin Credentials]: Updated store admin defaults to requested login (`admin@gmail.com` / `admin123`) in `store/prisma/seed.ts`, `store/.env.example`, and `store/.env.local`; database reseed attempt was blocked because `DATABASE_URL` is not yet configured in local env. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-09 [Commonwealth Store/Auth Login Fix]: Resolved repeated `401` invalid credentials path by normalizing credential email input (`trim().toLowerCase()`) in `store/src/lib/auth.ts` before Prisma lookup, and making `store/prisma/seed.ts` deterministically `upsert` the admin account with an updated hashed password on every seed run so requested credentials remain valid after reseeding. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-10 [Commonwealth Store/Production Auth Env Hardening]: Fixed deployed admin sign-in server errors by centralizing auth env resolution in `store/src/lib/auth-env.ts`, explicitly feeding the resolved secret into both `next-auth` and `getToken` middleware, adding `AUTH_SECRET`/`AUTH_URL` fallback support, routing NextAuth errors back to `/admin/login`, and preserving `callbackUrl` on credential sign-in so production redirects remain stable behind Vercel/custom-domain setups. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-10 [Commonwealth Store/Login Error Messaging]: Updated `store/src/app/admin/login/page.tsx` to detect `error=Configuration` from NextAuth and show a deployment-focused message on the login form so production auth misconfiguration is distinguishable from invalid credentials. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-10 [Commonwealth Store/Hardcoded Auth Fallback]: Removed store auth dependence on deployment-only auth env vars by adding a code-level default secret in `store/src/lib/auth-env.ts`, introduced hardcoded admin credential fallback (`admin@gmail.com` / `admin123`) in `store/src/lib/auth.ts` ahead of Prisma lookup, and updated the admin login UI copy in `store/src/app/admin/login/page.tsx` to surface the default access path instead of env-specific remediation. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-10 [Commonwealth Store/Admin Credential Alignment]: Updated the hardcoded auth fallback in `store/src/lib/auth-env.ts`, the admin login hint in `store/src/app/admin/login/page.tsx`, and seed defaults in `store/prisma/seed.ts` to use `abdullahtanseer@gmail.com` / `CommonWe@lth!` so runtime fallback and future reseeds stay aligned. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-10 [Commonwealth Store/Upload Fallback Hardening]: Fixed admin image upload failures by adding code-level Cloudinary fallback configuration in `store/src/lib/cloudinary.ts`, wrapping `store/src/app/api/upload/route.ts` in structured error handling so server failures return JSON instead of opaque 500s, and simplifying `store/src/components/admin/ImageUploader.tsx` to surface the actual API error returned by the server. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-11 [Commonwealth Store/Product Availability UI]: Replaced editable product stock counts with a boolean availability flow across `store/src/lib/validations.ts`, `store/src/components/admin/ProductForm.tsx`, API routes, store actions, admin listings, dashboard, analytics, and storefront purchase UI; availability now maps to the existing `stock` column internally (`1` for available, `0` for sold out) to avoid a breaking database migration while still rendering sold-out behavior consistently. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-11 [Commonwealth Store/Billing + Stripe Checkout]: Replaced the cart WhatsApp completion path with a proper billing flow by adding `/checkout`, Stripe session creation at `store/src/app/api/checkout/session/route.ts`, hardcoded coupon support in `store/src/lib/coupons.ts`, pricing helpers in `store/src/lib/checkout.ts`, success/cancel return pages, Stripe env documentation in `store/.env.example`, and implementation notes in `docs/store/stripe_checkout_impl.md`. Payments are restricted to card-only Stripe Checkout sessions for advance payment. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-11 [Commonwealth Store/Regional Pricing]: Added automatic market detection for Pakistan, the United States, and the United Kingdom by introducing request/cookie-based region helpers in `store/src/lib/pricing.ts` and `store/src/lib/pricing-server.ts`, setting a persistent `psz-region` cookie in `store/src/middleware.ts`, converting storefront/cart/checkout display pricing to regional currencies, and creating Stripe Checkout sessions in the detected market currency while keeping PKR as the catalog source of truth. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-11 [Commonwealth Store/Admin-Managed Region Pricing]: Replaced hardcoded region availability with persisted `StoreRegion` and `ProductRegionPrice` models in `store/prisma/schema.prisma`, added admin region activation/default controls in `store/src/app/admin/settings/page.tsx`, required product forms/APIs to capture prices for every active non-default region, and updated storefront/cart/checkout pricing to use explicit saved regional product prices instead of exchange-rate conversion. Prisma client regeneration is required after pulling these schema changes, and the database needs `prisma db push` before the new tables will exist. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-09 [Commonwealth Store/Admin Runtime + UI Redesign]: Fixed Next.js runtime error caused by passing non-serializable `render` callbacks from server admin pages into client `AdminTable` by replacing table API with serializable column kinds (`text`, `badge`, `image`) and preformatted row data in `store/src/app/admin/{products,categories,artists,sales}/page.tsx`; redesigned shared storefront/admin visuals to align with PSZ + Commonwealth aesthetic across `store/src/app/globals.css`, `store/src/components/storefront/{Navbar,Footer}.tsx`, `store/src/app/admin/layout.tsx`, `store/src/components/admin/{AdminSidebar,StatsCard,AdminTable}.tsx`, `store/src/app/admin/login/page.tsx`, and tuned `store/src/components/ui/button.tsx` variants for consistent premium styling. Type-check passes (`npx tsc --noEmit`, exit 0). (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-09 [Commonwealth Store/Deployment Env Safety]: Removed tracked `store/.env` from git and expanded root `.gitignore` to exclude `.env`, `.env.*`, and `store/.env` so Vercel uses project-managed environment variables instead of repository secrets during build/runtime. (COPILOT_LOG)
- 2026-03-09 [PSZ Main Web/Build Scope Isolation]: Fixed root Vercel build failure caused by the main Next.js app type-checking nested `store/` files (`store/prisma/seed.ts`) by excluding `store/**/*` in root `tsconfig.json` and constraining root Next ESLint build scope to `src` via `next.config.ts`. (COPILOT_LOG)
